# Project Memory

Universal cross-host session-state layer for `_agent_forge`. Renderers translate `policies/memory.json` into this file and the sibling `.forge_state/` directory.

Append-first by default. Use the `memory-archivist` skill to add entries; never edit anchor lines by hand. Secrets, credentials, and machine-local residue are denied at write time per `policies/memory.json`.
